scratchpad: [Compilation Check]: The code compiles without syntax errors. | [Rubric Check]: The function does not handle case insensitivity or ignore spaces. | [Edge Cases]: The function will return False for palindromes with spaces or different cases. | [Conclusion]: The function has logical errors.

logical_errors.issue: The function does not ignore spaces as required by the rubric.
logical_errors.fix: Use the `.replace(" ", "")` method on the string before comparing it to its reversed version.

logical_errors.issue: The function is not case-insensitive as required by the rubric.
logical_errors.fix: Use the `.lower()` method on the string before comparing it to its reversed version.

overview: The student's code demonstrates a basic understanding of string reversal but lacks attention to case insensitivity and space handling.
